name: powerbi-report-design
description: >- Generate Power BI report visual design guidance before PBIR files are written. Use when the user wants to: (1) choose tone, signature, page archetypes, chart types, layout, color, typography, theme direction, or accessibility approach, (2) redesign/restyle an existing report, apply a brand, or critique chart/layout choices, (3) produce a design contract for `powerbi-report-authoring`. For end-to-end requirements, approval, and build sequencing, use `powerbi-report-planning`. Triggers: "design
author: microsoft
